title: Sales Interior Designer (Full Time / Full Commission Based)
description:
Role Description

Reborn Interior Pte. Ltd. is looking for Full-time Sales Interior Designer based in Singapore. Sales Interior Designer will be responsible for developing and pursuing sales leads, meeting clients, and designing interior spaces.

Role & Responsibilities:

  • Handle sales enquires, meet new prospects & providing designs and values to create a unique & personalised space for home owners
  • Submitting pricing and quotations and negotiating with clients
  • Convert prospect into actual sales
  • Determine cost and timeline of projects
  • Undertake project from concept to completion
  • Preparation of design proposal to customers including research and decide on materials and product sourcing
  • Communicate effectively with client and vendors
  • Accompany client to designated vendors for materials, accessories and furniture selections when needed
  • Project Coordination & Supervision of work progress
  • Conduct on-site inspection to ensure quality workmanship are achieved

Requirements:

  • No prior experience is required, as training will be provided
  • Strong communication and organizational skills
  • Customer oriented and strong interest in sales and interior design
  • Demonstrated self-discipline, confidence, focus, willing to learn and a positive mindset
  • Sales driven, self-motivated and willing to go extra miles.
  • Strong ownership, independent and proactive in learning
  • Able to work independently and in teams
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and work in a collaborative team in a fast-paced environment to meet tight datelines
  • Strong attention to detail and ability to achieve superior results in a deadline-driven environment.

Benefits:

  • Self-employed with full commission topped with additional monthly incentives of minimum SGD10,000
  • Attractive commission and incentive of minimum SDG10,000 monthly
  • Annual overseas incentive trips to Europe and all other parts of the world
  • At least 20 quality leads given monthly
  • Close knitted team and company with full support from mentors, peers and company
  • Monthly professional and product trainings

Interested candidates, please WhatsApp us at https://wa.me/6581170774 or email us at reborninteriorsg@gmail.com. Thank you.
